title: Jona's Mace PvP Modpack
description: A Modpack for Mace PvP that has all you need!
body:
![lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93e4738e9066a4c19f50187ee204ba48063e5811.png)
# Mace PvP Re:Visualized

This is a Modpack for Mace PvP.
<details>
<summary></summary>
Recomended Version: 1.21.4


</details>



It has:

- Pre selected Servers to train on
- Practice Map by TheobaldTheBird
- Custom Mace hit animations
- Better fog
- Better Clouds
- Good Performance
- Dark Gui with Icons
- Essentials
- And more...
</details>

**Enjoy!**
